commits: 0b12743b494f2330d788ada54200f156f79aa051: test(transparency): RED — config-fallback enhanced-profile injection must record in ledger
c1d7c7b951b2dbb66b8fe9235700cda36f64ace5: fix(transparency): OBS-ledger-passthrough — record config-fallback enhanced-profile injection in the ledger

investigation.method: Scratch experiment (deleted before commit) loading a temp config and exercising enhanced_handler._load_profile_cache / _resolve_profile and EnhancedModelInterceptor.async_pre_call.
findings: Config cache (enhanced_handler._load_profile_cache) is keyed by model_name (e.g. 'gemini-coding'); the 'enhanced/<name>' provider-model suffix collapses to the same key.

enhanced_handler._resolve_profile('gemini-coding', {}) returns the full config profile (target_model + system_prompt) — the SAME resolution the provider uses at execution; non-enhanced models return {}.

For a config-fallback request the interceptor pre-call sees data['model']='gemini-coding' and data['litellm_params'] WITHOUT enhanced_profile, so Site 11 early-returns and records nothing — the confirmed gap.

The interceptor pre-call holds the OUTER metadata dict (data.setdefault('metadata', {})) — the same dict Site 11 and other ledger sites append to — so it is a valid pre-call, metadata-reachable recording point with NO litellm CustomLLM.completion contract change.

decision: Record one value-free inject in EnhancedModelInterceptor.async_pre_call's no-profile branch, reusing enhanced_handler._resolve_profile (the provider's own config cache). Observe-only: no payload/model/messages mutation in the config-fallback path (the passthrough provider still performs the actual injection at execution). Mutually exclusive with Site 11 (gated on `if not enhanced_profile`), so no double-record.
additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added 3 tests: config-fallback records exactly one inject (source=enhanced.passthrough, value-free); non-enhanced config model records none; litellm_params path still records exactly once (no double-record).

constraints_honored.CC-T2_value_free: inject record carries before=None/after=None; system-prompt text never enters the ledger (asserted).
constraints_honored.CC-T1_CC-T4_observe_only: No airlock_* keys changed; no behavior change — target-model/system-prompt resolution and injection remain in the provider, unchanged.
constraints_honored.no_double_record: Config-fallback branch runs only when litellm_params lacks enhanced_profile; Site 11 path unchanged.
constraints_honored.no_litellm_contract_change: No new param threaded through CustomLLM.completion; inner suppressed call untouched.

agent_verify_result: pass — 19 passed (tests/test_enhanced_interceptor.py + tests/test_enhanced_passthrough.py); integration+overrides 28 passed; ruff check + format clean; import has no circular-dependency.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.0-OBS-ledger-passthrough CLOSED on branch obs-passthrough at c1d7c7b951b2dbb66b8fe9235700cda36f64ace5; review, verify, merge.
